text: Being here feels peculiar and strangely unsettling. The stillness and darkness create an atmosphere of contemplation and anticipation. My awareness sharpens in the absence of others, and I find myself pondering the purpose of this space—I sense the weight of research and discovery (R + D), yet the emptiness and dimness evoke a sense of isolation. I feel both curious and slightly uneasy, as if I've stumbled into a place of waiting or transition, between illumination and obscurity.
